ddls:
CREATE TABLE "papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paper */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the paper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the paper */,
  "directory" TEXT /* Directory where the paper is stored */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the paper (e.g., 0 for draft, 1 for published) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the paper was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the paper was last modified */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who uploaded the paper */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the paper */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the paper */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the paper */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Number of times the paper has been cited */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the paper was published */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the paper */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the paper file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_papers_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., author, co-author, reviewer) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests or areas of expertise */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Short biography of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the paper */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the paper was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the paper */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the paper */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location (city, country) from where the paper was accessed */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, staff, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for programmatic access */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
